title: layia platyglossa
intro: Layia platyglossa, also known as the silver daisy or tidytips, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Layia platyglossa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Layia platyglossa typically involve making teas, tinctures, or infusions from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
